attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WI_NSOLT_CORE.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 WI_NSOLT_CORE.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT, 
 WI_NSOLT_CORE.SS_CODE, 
 WI_NSOLT_CORE.BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT,
  WI_NSOLT_CORE.BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT,
   WI_NSOLT_CORE.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
    WI_NSOLT_CORE.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT, 
    WI_NSOLT_CORE.START_SSP_DATE, 
    WI_NSOLT_CORE.START_TV_DTM, 
    WI_NSOLT_CORE.END_SSP_DATE, 
    WI_NSOLT_CORE.END_TV_DTM, 
    WI_NSOLT_CORE.DISPATCH_DTM, 
    WI_NSOLT_CORE.PRINT_QUEUE_NAME, 
    WI_NSOLT_CORE.CNTRCT_CONVERSION_STATUS_NAME, 
    WI_NSOLT_CORE.DISPATCH_STATUS_CD, 
 WI_NSOLT_CORE.SOL_SHIP_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD,  /* ICW */
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
WI_NSOLT_CORE.SOL_TAA_FLG,
WI_NSOLT_CORE. INIT_PRMSD_TO_CUST_SHPMNT_DT
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NSOLT_CORE

SELECT NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, NSOLT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT, NSOLT.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT, NSOLT.BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT, NSOLT.BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT, NSOLT.START_TV_DATETIME, NSOLT.START_SSP_DATE, 
NSOLT.END_TV_DATETIME,
NSOLT.END_SSP_DATE,
NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
NSOLT.SS_CODE ,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))  DISPATCH_DTM,
NULL AS PRINT_QUEUE_NAME,
NULL AS CNTRCT_CONVERSION_STATUS_NAME,
NULL AS DISPATCH_STATUS_CD,
'=' AS SOL_SHIP_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD, /* ICW */
'=' AS SOL_TAA_FLG, /* Q4FY12 TAA*/
NSOLT. PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOLT  
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLVT WHERE NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLVT .SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AND NSOLVT.SS_CODE NOT IN ('OPL'))
AND NSOLT.SS_CODE NOT IN ('OPL')

SELECT 
LINE_ID,
GLOBAL_NAME,
SHIPPABLE_FLAG,
EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SCORL   
WHERE   NOT EXISTS 
(
SELECT 1 FROM 
(
SELECT NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,ELT1.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE ,ELT1.INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT,ELT1.LINE_ID,ELT1.GLOBAL_NAME
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSCC
    ON ( NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = (  CASE WHEN ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN  'QTC' 
                                WHEN  ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_CODE= 'BV.CISCO.COM' THEN  'BV'    ELSE  'CG'  END ))
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
    ON NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID 
    AND NSOLV.SS_CODE =  NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
   /*  WHERE  ELT1.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE  like '11i%'   commenting as per Q3FY14-SC LSS */
   WHERE ELT1.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE='11i'  /* Adding as  per  Q3FY14-SC LSS */
    AND   ELT1.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE IS NOT  NULL
) SOL
WHERE  SOL.LINE_ID = SCORL.LINE_ID 
AND SOL.GLOBAL_NAME = SCORL.GLOBAL_NAME
)

SELECT 
SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
SCORL.LINE_ID,
SCORL.GLOBAL_NAME, 
/* MODIFIED AS PART OF LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE IMPLEMENTATION Q3FY14 SCLSS APRIL RELEASE*/
COALESCE(CASE WHEN TABLE_CODE ='EXT' THEN SOL.SHIPPABLE_ROLE ELSE SCORL.SHIPPABLE_FLAG END,'N') SHIPPABLE_FLAG, 
CASE WHEN TABLE_CODE ='EXT' THEN SOL.EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE ELSE SCORL.EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE END EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE,
COALESCE(SOL.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE ,'UNKNOWN' ),
COALESCE(SOL.INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT,'UNKNOWN') INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT,
COALESCE(SOL.LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,'UNKNOWN') LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE ,/*NEW REQUIREMENT Q3FY14 SCLSS APRIL RELEASE*/
/* END OF CHANGE */
/* As part of Q3FY15 addition of 3 columns */
COALESCE(SOL.LEG0_TRANSITPAD,-999) AS LEG0_STD_TRANSIT_TIME_DAYS_CNT,
COALESCE(SOL.LEG1_TRANSITPAD,-999) AS LEG1_STD_TRANSIT_TIME_DAYS_CNT,
COALESCE(SOL.LEG2_TRANSITPAD,-999)  AS LEG2_STD_TRANSIT_TIME_DAYS_CNT,
/* As part of Q3FY15 addition of 3 columns */
/* Q1FY16 column addition starts*/
DERIVED_CUST_REQ_SHIP_DATE AS DERIVED_CUST_REQ_SHIP_DATE
/* Q1FY16 column addition */ 
FROM
( 
SELECT LINE_ID, GLOBAL_NAME, SHIPPABLE_FLAG,CAST(EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE AS DATE ) AS EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE, 'CG' AS TABLE_CODE FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CG_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL
UNION ALL
SELECT LINE_ID, GLOBAL_NAME, SHIPPABLE_FLAG,CAST(EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE AS DATE) AS EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE,'EXCEP' AS TABLE_CODE  FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL 
WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
/* Q3FY14 SCLSS APRIL RELEASE for LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE & shipping route code */
UNION ALL  
SELECT SCXGCO.LINE_ID,SCXGCO.GLOBAL_NAME,'N' AS SHIPPABLE_FLAG,DATE '3500-01-01'   EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE, 'EXT' AS TABLE_CODE FROM  
  $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORDER_LINES SCXGCO       
  LEFT JOIN ( SELECT  LINE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME  FROM
  ( SELECT  LINE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL 
UNION  ALL
SELECT  LINE_ID,GLOBAL_NAME FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_WI_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL ) STG
) STG_CG  ON
STG_CG.LINE_ID = SCXGCO.LINE_ID 
AND STG_CG.GLOBAL_NAME=SCXGCO.GLOBAL_NAME
WHERE 
STG_CG.LINE_ID  IS NULL
/* END OF CHANGE */
) SCORL
INNER    JOIN 
(
SELECT NSOLV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,ELT1.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE ,ELT1.INVOICE_ELIGIBILITY_EVENT,ELT1.LINE_ID,ELT1.GLOBAL_NAME,ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID,ELT1.LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE,NSOLV.SHIPPABLE_ROLE,NSOLV.EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DLVRY_DT  EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE,
/* As part of Q3FY15 addition of 3 columns */
ELT1.LEG0_TRANSITPAD,
ELT1.LEG1_TRANSITPAD,
ELT1.LEG2_TRANSITPAD,
/* As part of Q3FY15 addition of 3 columns */
/* Q1FY16 column addition starts*/
ELT1.DERIVED_CUST_REQ_SHIP_DATE
/* Q1FY16 column addition */ 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT ELT1
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSCC
   ON ( NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = (  CASE WHEN ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_CODE = 'SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN  'QTC' 
                               WHEN  ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_CODE= 'BV.CISCO.COM' THEN  'BV'    ELSE  'CG'  END ))
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV NSOLV
   ON NSOLV.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT =  ELT1.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID 
   AND NSOLV.SS_CODE =  NSSCC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  
   WHERE  COALESCE(ELT1.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') <>  '11i'  
   /*AND ELT1.OTM_IB_SHIPPING_ROUTE_CODE IS NOT NULL */ /* Q3FY14 SCLSS APRIL RELEASE COMMENTED AS PART OF LEGACY_SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE IMPLEMENTATION*/
   QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID,CMS_SOURCE_CODE ORDER BY LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1
   /* ADDED TO HANDLE DUPLICATES Q3FY14 SCLSS APRIL RELEASE */
   ) SOL
ON SOL.LINE_ID = SCORL.LINE_ID 
AND SOL.GLOBAL_NAME = SCORL.GLOBAL_NAME
AND SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY <> 192364826

SELECT EX.LINE_ID, EX.HEADER_ID, EX.LINE_TYPE_ID, EX.LINE_NUMBER, EX.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, EX.SHIPMENT_NUMBER, EX.CREATION_DATE, EX.CREATED_BY, EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, EX.LAST_UPDATED_BY, EX.OPEN_FLAG, EX.BOOKED_FLAG, EX.ORG_ID, EX.ORDERED_ITEM, EX.REQUEST_DATE, EX.PROMISE_DATE, EX.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE, EX.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID, EX.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID, EX.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID, EX.DELIVER_TO_ORG_ID, EX.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID, EX.DELIVER_TO_CONTACT_ID, EX.INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID, EX.INTMED_SHIP_TO_ORG_ID, EX.INTMED_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID, EX.SOLD_FROM_ORG_ID, EX.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID, EX.CUST_PO_NUMBER, EX.EARLIEST_ACCEPTABLE_DATE, EX.SHIPPABLE_FLAG, EX.GES_UPDATE_DATE, EX.GLOBAL_NAME, EX.BATCH_ID, EX.ACTION_CD, EX.CREATE_DATETIME , EX.DEMAND_CLASS_CODE,  'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL EX
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
ON EX.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT
AND NCOU.MOVED_TO_CG1_FLG  = 'N'   
INNER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL GG
ON ex.LINE_ID = GG.LINE_ID 
AND GG.ITEM_TYPE_CODE <> 'CONFIG'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT EL.LINE_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT EL
WHERE  EX.LINE_ID = EL.LINE_ID
AND EL.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID IS NOT NULL )
